title: Binary corporate referendum-style decision over 7 polling rounds

events.description: Media reports began circulating regarding Facebook's internal plans to rebrand the company and change its corporate name
CEO PRO_LEADER_1 addressed NEUTRAL_1 criticism of the company's social services during the Q3 YEAR earnings call while emphasizing a strategic pivot toward the metaverse
PRO_LEADER_1 officially announced at the Facebook Connect conference that the parent company would be renamed Meta Platforms, Inc
The company formally outlined its 'metaverse-first' strategy, aiming to build an interconnected digital ecosystem using VR and AR technologies

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_1
agents.description: CEO of Meta, primary driver of the metaverse pivot

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_1
agents.description: Whistleblower whose testimony significantly damaged NEUTRAL_1 trust

agents.name: AGAINST_SUPPORTER_1
agents.description: Media outlets covering the rebrand as a distraction from regulatory scrutiny

agents.name: PRO_LEADER_2
agents.description: AGAINST_SUPPORTER_1 enthusiasts interested in VR/AR and virtual worlds

agents.name: NEUTRAL_1
agents.description: Average social media users skeptical of Facebook's privacy record

agents.name: AGAINST_LEADER_2
agents.description: Legislators focused on antitrust and data privacy regulation
